API Reference¶

Extractor¶

Módulo de Extracción y Persistencia de Datos Biomecánicos (InfluxDB -> HDF5).

Este módulo implementa un motor de extracción masiva que garantiza la integridad de las series temporales, gestiona la internacionalización de logs y centraliza el almacenamiento en contenedores jerárquicos de alto rendimiento.

class gait_analysis.extractor.InfluxConfig(*, url, token, org, bucket)[source]¶

Bases: BaseModel

Esquema de validación para parámetros de conexión a InfluxDB v2.

Parameters:

  • url (str)

  • token (str)

  • org (str)

  • bucket (str)

url: str¶
token: str¶
org: str¶
bucket: str¶
model_config: ClassVar[ConfigDict] = {}¶

Configuration for the model, should be a dictionary conforming to [ConfigDict][pydantic.config.ConfigDict].

gait_analysis.extractor.get_text(key, lang='es', **kwargs)[source]¶

Helper para la recuperación de literales multi-idioma.

Parameters:

  • key (str)

  • lang (str)

Return type:

str

class gait_analysis.extractor.GaitDataExtractor(influx_config, output_h5='data/raw/gait_study_data.h5', lang='es', verbose=1)[source]¶

Bases: object

Motor de extracción masiva con validación de esquema y gestión de persistencia.

Parameters:

  • influx_config (dict)

  • output_h5 (str | Path)

  • lang (str)

  • verbose (int)

__init__(influx_config, output_h5='data/raw/gait_study_data.h5', lang='es', verbose=1)[source]¶

Inicializa el cliente de InfluxDB y valida el entorno de salida.

Parameters:

  • influx_config (dict)

  • output_h5 (str | Path)

  • lang (str)

  • verbose (int)

run_batch_extraction(csv_filepath='tests.csv', test_type='6MWT')[source]¶

Ejecuta el pipeline de extracción masiva definido en el registro CSV.

Parameters:

  • csv_filepath (str | Path)

  • test_type (str)

Return type:

None

close()[source]¶

Finaliza la conexión con el servidor InfluxDB.

Processor¶

Digital Signal Processing (DSP) Module for Human Gait Analysis.

This module provides high-level abstractions for processing inertial and pressure sensor data. It focuses on zero-phase digital filtering, automated spatial calibration, and clinical metric extraction such as stride time variability.

The architecture ensures hardware-agnostic processing by implementing gravity-based orientation detection and pydantic-validated configuration.

class gait_analysis.processor.ProcessConfig(*, fs=100.0, cutoff_pressure=5.0, cutoff_gyro=2.0, gyro_threshold=50.0, min_peak_distance=50, min_peak_height=0.2)[source]¶

Bases: BaseModel

Configuration schema for gait signal processing parameters.

Validated via Pydantic v2 to ensure strict typing and range constraints on DSP hyperparameters.

Attributes¶

fsfloat

Sampling frequency in Hz. Must be positive.

cutoff_pressurefloat

Low-pass cutoff frequency for pressure sensors (S0) in Hz.

cutoff_gyrofloat

Low-pass cutoff frequency for gyroscope signals (Gz) in Hz.

gyro_thresholdfloat

Angular velocity threshold (°/s) to trigger turn detection.

min_peak_distanceint

Minimum number of samples between consecutive Heel Strikes.

min_peak_heightfloat

Normalized amplitude threshold for peak detection on S0.

fs: float¶
cutoff_pressure: float¶
cutoff_gyro: float¶
gyro_threshold: float¶
min_peak_distance: int¶
min_peak_height: float¶
model_config: ClassVar[ConfigDict] = {}¶

Configuration for the model, should be a dictionary conforming to [ConfigDict][pydantic.config.ConfigDict].

Parameters:

  • fs (float)

  • cutoff_pressure (float)

  • cutoff_gyro (float)

  • gyro_threshold (float)

  • min_peak_distance (int)

  • min_peak_height (float)

class gait_analysis.processor.GaitDataProcessor(config=None)[source]¶

Bases: object

Main engine for biomechanical signal decomposition and event detection.

Provides a robust pipeline for transforming raw sensor telemetry into validated gait cycles. Includes automated vertical axis detection and steady-state walking segmentation.

Parameters¶

configOptional[ProcessConfig], default=None

Injected configuration object. If None, default values are used.

Attributes¶

configProcessConfig

The active configuration schema for the processor instance.

loggerlogging.Logger

Scoped logger for tracking DSP events and warnings.

__init__(config=None)[source]¶

Initialize the processor with validated configuration.

Parameters:

config (ProcessConfig | None)

process_signals(df)[source]¶

Execute the full analysis pipeline on a gait trial.

The pipeline follows a deterministic sequence: 1. Temporal sorting and datetime conversion. 2. Orientation autodetection via gravity vectors. 3. Zero-phase digital filtering of pressure and rotational signals. 4. Spatial segmentation (exclusion of turning phases). 5. Heuristic event detection (Heel Strikes) and metric calculation.

Parameters¶

dfpd.DataFrame

Raw dataset containing ‘_time’, ‘S0’, ‘Gz’, and IMU axes.

Returns¶

df_procpd.DataFrame

Enriched dataframe with filtered signals and masks.

metricsDict[str, Any]

Dictionary containing ‘pasos_detectados’, ‘stride_medio_s’, ‘stride_std_s’, and ‘posicion_gps’.

peaksnp.ndarray

Array of indices identifying the detected Heel Strike events.

Raises¶

ValueError

If ‘S0’ or ‘_time’ columns are missing from the input dataframe.

Parameters:

df (DataFrame)

Return type:

Tuple[DataFrame, Dict[str, Any], ndarray]

Parameters:

config (ProcessConfig | None)

gait_analysis.processor.main()[source]¶

Punto de entrada para el comando CLI ‘analyze-gait’.

Inicializa el procesador con la configuración por defecto y sirve como demostración de la integridad del paquete.

CLI: extract_data¶

Command-line interface for batch extraction of gait sensor data.

This module provides a CLI entry point to extract time-series data from InfluxDB and store it locally (e.g., HDF5) for further processing.

gait_analysis.cli.extract_data.build_parser()[source]¶

Create and configure the argument parser for the extract-data CLI.

Returns:

Configured parser with CLI arguments.

Return type:

argparse.ArgumentParser

gait_analysis.cli.extract_data.load_config(config_path)[source]¶

Load YAML configuration file.

Parameters:

config_path (str) – Path to the configuration file.

Returns:

Parsed configuration dictionary.

Return type:

dict

gait_analysis.cli.extract_data.main()[source]¶

Entry point for the extract-data CLI command.

Parses input arguments, loads project configuration, initializes the extractor, and executes batch extraction.

Return type:

None

CLI: analyze_gait¶

Command-line interface for gait signal processing and analysis.

This module provides a CLI entry point to process previously extracted gait data and compute biomechanical metrics.

gait_analysis.cli.analyze_gait.resolve_path(base_dir, value)[source]¶

Resolve relative paths against the project root.

Parameters:

  • base_dir (Path)

  • value (str)

Return type:

Path

gait_analysis.cli.analyze_gait.build_parser()[source]¶

Create and configure the argument parser for the analyze-gait CLI.

Returns:

Configured parser with CLI arguments.

Return type:

argparse.ArgumentParser

gait_analysis.cli.analyze_gait.setup_logging(verbose)[source]¶

Configure logging based on verbosity level.

Parameters:

verbose (int) – Verbosity level from CLI.

Return type:

None

gait_analysis.cli.analyze_gait.load_config(config_path)[source]¶

Load YAML configuration file.

Parameters:

config_path (str) – Path to the configuration file.

Returns:

Parsed configuration dictionary.

Return type:

dict

Raises:

FileNotFoundError – If the config file does not exist.

gait_analysis.cli.analyze_gait.main()[source]¶

Entry point for the analyze-gait CLI command.

Loads configuration, sets up logging, and initializes the gait processing pipeline.

Return type:

None
